description_long: This skateboard features a standard, elongated deck with a slightly upturned nose and tail, constructed primarily from layered wood with a dark, grippy surface on top. The deck is bordered by a thin, lighter-colored edge, likely the exposed wood ply, giving it a classic look. Underneath, two sets of black wheels are mounted on metal trucks, providing stability and maneuverability for urban riding. The grip tape on the top is a solid, dark color, offering traction for the rider's feet. There are no visible graphics or brand logos on the deck or wheels, emphasizing a minimalist, utilitarian design. The overall build suggests durability and functionality for street or park use.
description: A minimalist skateboard with a dark, grippy deck, exposed wood edges, and black wheels on metal trucks. The design is simple and functional, with no visible graphics or branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the skateboard, the upturned nose and tail, and both sets of black wheels.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow width of the deck and the single set of wheels visible beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the skateboard's profile and both sets of wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the deck's width at the tail and the rear set of wheels.
attribute_wheel_type: street, black, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, black, top-mounted, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern, graphics, or text
